steps.title: Read the rate from the table
steps.content: Every answer has the form $f(x)=mx$, so the multiplier is $m=\frac{f(x)}{x}$. Using the first row, $$m=\frac{4536}{2520}=1.8.$$

steps.title: Verify the constant multiplier
steps.content: The other rows give the same value: $$\frac{6804}{3780}=1.8$$ and $$\frac{9072}{5040}=1.8.$$ So the relationship is proportional with constant of proportionality $1.8$.

steps.title: Graph or table-check in Desmos
steps.content: Enter the table and overlay the correct proportional model. The line $y=1.8x$ passes through all three points. The other choices can be rejected from the table ratios because their multipliers are not $1.8$.

steps.title: Confirm the equation
steps.content: The function that matches all rows is $f(x)=1.8x$, so B is correct.
